title: pubkey_fingerprint is truncated base64, not SHA-256
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_config.c:489-499 (compute_pubkey_fingerprint). spec/11-lci.md §17.5.2: pubkey_fingerprint = 'SHA256:xY7...'. Code emits 'SHA256:' + base64(first 12 bytes of the pubkey) with no hash computed. A client verifying the node key against an independently computed SHA-256 (as coap_keys.c:299 correctly does) gets a mismatch; a non-cryptographic value is presented as a security identifier. Fix: use the real SHA-256 already present in coap_keys.c (share the helper).
